# services.rsnapshot

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.rsnapshot`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.rsnapshot.cronIntervals` | `attribute set of string` | Periodicity at which intervals should be run by cron. Note that the intervals also have to exist in configuration as retain options. |
| `services.rsnapshot.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable rsnapshot backups. |
| `services.rsnapshot.enableManualRsnapshot` | `boolean` | Whether to enable manual usage of the rsnapshot command with this module. |
| `services.rsnapshot.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | rsnapshot configuration option in addition to the defaults from rsnapshot and this module. Note that tabs are required to separate option arguments, and directory names require trailing slashes. The "extra" in the option name might be a little misleading right now, as it is required to get a functional configuration. |
